mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_facility_watch_check WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY check_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_facility_watch_check WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_facility_watch_check ( watch_id, facility_name, facility_type, risk_grade, check_date, content, checker, anomaly, action, next_check_date, risk_change, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{watchId}, #{facilityName}, #{facilityType}, #{riskGrade}, #{checkDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{content}, #{checker}, #{anomaly}, #{action}, #{nextCheckDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{riskChange}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_facility_watch_check SET watch_id = #{watchId}, facility_name = #{facilityName}, facility_type = #{facilityType}, risk_grade = #{riskGrade}, check_date = #{checkDate,jdbcType=DATE}, content = #{content}, checker = #{checker}, anomaly = #{anomaly}, action = #{action}, next_check_date = #{nextCheckDate,jdbcType=DATE}, risk_change = #{riskChange}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_facility_watch_check SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
